name: Gumroad
description: Gumroad is a creator commerce platform for selling digital products, memberships, and subscriptions. The API allows managing products, retrieving sales analytics, verifying software licenses, handling subscribers, and managing offer codes.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all products for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific product.

capabilities.name: sales_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of sales with optional date filtering.

capabilities.name: sales_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific sale.

capabilities.name: licenses_verify
capabilities.description: Verify a software license key for a product.

capabilities.name: subscribers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve subscribers for a specific product.

capabilities.name: subscribers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific subscriber.

capabilities.name: offer_codes_list
capabilities.description: List all offer codes for a product.

capabilities.name: offer_codes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new offer code for a product.
